feature_name: make_timestamptz(bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, double)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE);
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = make_timestamptz(2000, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' FROM timestamps;
